tests.test_name: Logged-in user can enable multi-file mode

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user enables multi-file mode and verifies that the file queue becomes visible while the single-file input area is hidden.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Logged-in user can enable multi-file mode
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with APIs mocked
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: File queue is visible and single-file input area is not visible

tests.test_name: Switching to multi-file mode clears the single-file input

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user who has typed content in the single-file input switches to multi-file mode, and the previously entered content is cleared.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Switching to multi-file mode clears the single-file input
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User has typed content in the input area

tests.test_name: Switching back to single-file mode clears the queue

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user adds a file to the queue in multi-file mode then switches back to single-file mode, verifying the queue is hidden and the single-file input area is restored.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Switching back to single-file mode clears the queue
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with APIs mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User enables multi-file mode, adds a file, then disables multi-file mode
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: File queue is not visible and single-file input area is visible

tests.test_name: Files can be added and removed from the queue

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user adds a file to the multi-file queue confirming the count increments, then removes it confirming the queue returns to empty.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Files can be added and removed from the queue
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is in multi-file mode with APIs mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User adds a file then removes it from the queue
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Queue shows 1 file after adding, then queue is empty after removal

tests.test_name: Files can be added to the queue via drag-and-drop

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user drops a file onto the queue drop zone in multi-file mode and verifies it appears in the queue with an ok badge.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Files can be added to the queue via drag-and-drop
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is in multi-file mode with APIs mocked
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User drops a fixture file onto the queue drop zone
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Queue shows 1 file and the file row displays an ok badge

tests.test_name: Adding a file with a duplicate filename shows a toast and does not add it to the queue

test_hooks.name: Given the analysis API is mocked; And the multi-file API is mocked; And I am on the Analyze page
test_hooks.explanation: Mocks both the analysis and multi-file APIs and navigates to the Analyze page before each scenario.

tests.journey: A logged-in user attempts to add the same file to the queue twice and verifies a warning toast is shown while the queue count remains at one.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Adding a file with a duplicate filename shows a toast and does not add it to the queue
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is in multi-file mode with one file already in the queue
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User attempts to add the same fixture file a second time
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A warning toast containing 'is already in the queue' is shown and the queue still shows 1 file
